title: Children's Creativity Museum (San Francisco) - Whichmuseum
content: # Children's Creativity Museum. 5. Current: Children's Creativity Museum. ## Children's Creativity Museum and its collection. The Children's Creativity Museum, located in Yerba Buena Gardens in San Francisco, California, is an interactive museum designed for children aged 2–12 years. The museum offers a variety of workshops and exhibits that encourage children to produce their own media.
